title: portulaca fragilis
intro: Portulaca fragilis, also known as the delicate purslane, is a type of succulent plant that belongs to the Portulacaceae family. Traditionally, Portulaca fragilis has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and acting as an antioxidant. In herbal preparations, Portulaca fragilis is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness.
